title: "She is going to end up in jail again": Asmongold fires back after Nina Lin blames him for spending night in jail over $4 scissors
summary_full: Asmongold responded harshly after Nina Lin blamed him and his viewers for a situation that allegedly led to her spending a night in jail over unscanned $4 scissors. During a livestream, Nina suggested an Asmongold viewer reported her to police. Asmongold mocked her claims, called the incident “stupid,” and predicted she would “end up in jail again,” escalating the viral feud across Twitch and social media platforms.
